hero.subtitle: Handcrafted candles inspired by the Mediterranean sea. Soy wax, eco resin and the beauty of Cap de Creus.

manifest.label: Our philosophy
manifest.title:
Every candle,
a story from the sea
manifest.text: We live by the Mediterranean and bring it to your home. Every piece is born from observing nature: the shapes of sea snails, the spiral of shells, the texture of sea urchins. Nothing synthetic. Nothing artificial. All handmade from scratch, with materials that respect the sea that inspires us.

materials.label: Our materials
materials.soja_text: 100% plant-based. Burns cleaner and longer than paraffin wax.
materials.jesmonite_text: The most eco-friendly resin on the market. Biodegradable and VOC-free. The jars last forever.
materials.vegan_text: We never use organic elements like real shells or sea snails. Everything is respectful of marine life.
materials.local_text: Every piece is handcrafted in our Cadaqués studio, in the heart of Cap de Creus Natural Park.

products.name: Curculla XL
products.desc: The largest candle in the collection

products.name: Corna
products.desc: With colored glass from our beaches

footer.bio: Handcrafted candles made with soy wax and ecological Jesmonite resin. Biodegradable and always respectful of the environment.
